svg.style: position: absolute; width: 0; height: 0; overflow: hidden;

symbol.class: inline-block h-4 w-4 shrink-0 transition-transform group-hover/link:-translate-y-1 group-hover/link:translate-x-1 group-focus-visible/link:-translate-y-1 group-focus-visible/link:translate-x-1 motion-reduce:transition-none ml-1 translate-y-px
